summary: Add table-driven tests for pure-logic helpers: splitAndUpper, parseDurationOrDate (incl. d/w/h/m shortcuts + ISO date + RFC3339), nextRefreshDate, tierRank, lastN (with synthetic key fixture), and cross-rate computation invariants.
reason: Hand-authored novel commands contain pure functions worth pinning against future refactors. Reviewer requested coverage for matrix arithmetic and duration parsing. The lastN test uses a synthetic 24-char key fixture (fake0000000000000fake37ac) ending in the same last-4 as a real key shape, so the test exercises the algorithm without embedding a credential pattern.
validated_outcome: go test ./internal/cli/ -run TestSplitAndUpper|TestParseDurationOrDate|TestNextRefreshDate|TestTierRank|TestLastN|TestCrossRateComputation -v passes; full suite green.
